ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_quarters" (
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial quarter */,
  "quarter_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial quarter (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial quarter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial quarter */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quarter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., All Expenditure, Operating Profit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial metric (e.g., income, expense, ratio) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the financial metric (e.g., currency, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial quarter */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric for the quarter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES financial_quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, department head) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "quarter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial quarter */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "forecasted_value" REAL /* Forecasted value of the metric for the quarter */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_quarter_id FOREIGN KEY ("quarter_id") REFERENCES financial_quarters ("quarter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecasting model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the forecasting model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_log_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_log_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)
